title: cynanchum aphyllum
intro: Cynanchum aphyllum, also known as the Chinese milkvine or Chong Lou, is a type of plant that belongs to the Apocynaceae family. Traditionally, it has been used in Chinese medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant properties. The health benefits of Cynanchum aphyllum include its ability to reduce stress and anxiety, improve sleep quality, and lower blood pressure. The plant can be prepared in various herbal forms, such as teas, capsules, and tinctures, which can be obtained from herbal stores or online retailers.
